name: venus
description: A lightning-fast terminal-based Second Brain and personal assistant

scripts.test: bun test tests/core/theme.test.ts && bun test tests/core/chat/prompts.test.ts && bun test tests/core/memory/embeddings.test.ts && bun test tests/core/memory/database.test.ts && bun test tests/core/memory/index.test.ts && bun test tests/core/memory/manager.test.ts && bun test tests/core/mcp/operations.test.ts && bun test tests/core/mcp/registry.test.ts && bun test tests/core/notes/service.test.ts && bun test tests/core/z_chat_service.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path coverage) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force coverage }" && bun test tests/core/theme.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/theme && bun test tests/core/chat/prompts.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/prompts && bun test tests/core/memory/embeddings.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/embeddings && bun test tests/core/memory/database.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/database && bun test tests/core/memory/index.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/memory-index && bun test tests/core/memory/manager.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/manager && bun test tests/core/mcp/operations.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/operations && bun test tests/core/mcp/registry.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/registry && bun test tests/core/notes/service.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/notes && bun test tests/core/z_chat_service.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/chat-service && bun run scripts/check-coverage.mjs
